drifted.spec_text: System MUST support synchronous read and write operations with parameters for NVMe namespace id, DmaBuffer, LBA offset, and timeout.
drifted.actual: ReadSync and WriteSync commands have ns_id, lba, and buf parameters but no timeout field.

drifted.spec_text: System MUST support asynchronous read and write operations with a timeout value; operations exceeding timeout MUST return an error.
drifted.actual: ReadAsync and WriteAsync exist with timeout_ms but execute synchronously. Pending ops are inserted and immediately removed; timeout tracking never fires.

drifted.spec_text: System MUST support aborting an in-flight asynchronous operation identified by its component-assigned operation handle.
drifted.actual: AbortOp handler exists but is ineffective because async ops complete synchronously and pending ops are immediately removed.

drifted.spec_text: System MUST support a write-zeros operation.
System MUST support probing, creating, formatting, and deleting NVMe namespaces.
drifted.actual: Only NsProbe works. create(), format(), and delete() return NvmeBlockError::NotSupported due to missing SPDK bindings.

drifted.spec_text: System MUST support controller hardware reset with graceful handling of in-flight operations.
drifted.actual: ControllerReset cancels pending ops but returns NotSupported for the actual reset.

drifted.spec_text: When compiled with the telemetry feature, system MUST collect and expose min/max/mean IO latencies, total operation count, and mean throughput.
drifted.actual: TelemetryStats infrastructure exists but record() is never called from the IO dispatch path. Statistics are always zero.

drifted.spec_text: When a client disconnects, the component MUST cancel all in-flight operations and silently discard any pending completions.
drifted.actual: Disconnect requires explicit ControlMessage::DisconnectClient; auto-detection of channel drop not implemented. Handler sends error completions rather than silently discarding.

drifted.spec_text: Asynchronous operations that exceed their specified timeout are reported as errors within a bounded margin.
drifted.actual: Async ops complete synchronously; timeout never fires (depends on FR-004).

drifted.spec_text: The component correctly handles all namespace management lifecycle operations (probe, create, format, delete).
drifted.actual: Only probe works; create/format/delete return NotSupported (depends on FR-008).

unspecced.suggested_spec: Document in FR-001/FR-002 client API contract
Internal optimization; no spec change needed
